violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of heavy cream stored on floor win walk in cooler

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Store boxes of single service items (spoons, paper towels, & portion cups) off floor in back storage area.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Drain line from walk in cooler compressor leaking and needs repair.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have a build-up of food debris under equipment in FOH prep/service area.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. East delivery door not fitted with self closing mechanism. Large gap at door threshold. Not properly maintained.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied in a way that prevents contamination to food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Windex bottles stored next to single service food wraps in BOH prep area. Store with other cleaning chemicals away from food service items.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Sanitizer buckets need to be changed.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. 2 of 3 hand sinks not provided with drying towels.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under equipment.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Upper portion of walls not properly sealed.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
